title: premna corymbosa var. obtusifolia
intro: Premna corymbosa var. obtusifolia is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the mosquito plant, due to its strong fragrance that repels mosquitoes and other insects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Premna corymbosa var. obtusifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
